S.FORM: == wasiq == sraran spiyang niqun bnkis ga wasiq. mtasiq iro na wasiq. hbk'an maki tuqiy qun ru qmayah na wasiq. blaq niqun kahun rgyax ramat
S.PHON: == was~ɕiq == s~ɕraran s~ɕpijaŋ niqun βnkis~ɕ ɣa was~ɕiq. mtas~ɕiq iro na was~ɕiq. ħβkʔan maki tuqij qun ru qmajaħ na was~ɕiq. βlaq niqun kaħun rɣjax ramat
S.FORM: == wasiq == sraran spiyang niqun bnkis ga wasiq. mtasiq iro na wasiq. hbk'an maki tuqiy qun ru qmayah na wasiq. blaq niqun kahun rgyax ramat
S.PHON: == was~ɕiq == s~ɕraran s~ɕpijaŋ niqun βnkis~ɕ ɣa was~ɕiq. mtas~ɕiq iro na was~ɕiq. ħβkʔan maki tuqij qun ru qmajaħ na was~ɕiq. βlaq niqun kaħun rɣjax ramat
